name: Terrific Turkey Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut turkey into small pieces.
2. Process the turkey and onion together in a food processor, or chop them by hand.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the processed mixture and mix well.
4. Chill the spread before serving.
This recipe was originally published in "Diabetes Self-Management" magazine as prepared by Nancy Cooper, a registered dietitian at the International Diabetes Center in Minneapolis, MN. You can use home-cooked turkey or deli-style turkey.
